dynamic_line: &You see a bulbous, black computer screen.  It would almost be mundane on Earth's early 1990s.  Next to it is a large, clear plastic toggle switch, yellowed and brittle with age.

&There is an electronic whirr, following by a click and a high-pitched ringing that slowly fades.  The screen turns on and garbled text and images cover the screen.  It is either some language you do not understand, or a series of confounding errors.  Three circle dominate the top of the screen - after just a few seconds, one circle lights up orange.

&There is an electronic whirr, following by a click and a high-pitched ringing that slowly fades.  The screen turns on and garbled text and images cover the screen.  It is either some language you do not understand, or a series of confounding errors.  Three circle dominate the top of the screen - after just a few seconds, two circles light up orange.

&There is an electronic whirr, following by a click and a high-pitched ringing that slowly fades.  The screen turns on and garbled text and images cover the screen.  It is either some language you do not understand, or a series of confounding errors.  Three circle dominate the top of the screen - after just a few seconds, all three circles light up orange.

Immediately, three similar dots appear on the garbled image, and after a few punctuated corrections, the image morphs into a highly pixelated topological map.  A fourth, blinking light appears.  You make note if its location in reference to the three terminals you've visited.
&There is an electronic whirr, following by a click and a high-pitched ringing that slowly fades.  A familiar topological map forms.  You glean no new information from it.

name: powered odd monitor
description: A bulbous monitor.  It displays a garbled image and one glowing circle.

name: powered odd monitor
description: A bulbous monitor.  It displays a garbled image and two glowing circles.

name: powered odd monitor
description: A bulbous monitor.  It displays a topological map.  There's nothing new or interesting on it.
